reviews.review_title: Nice ride, and nice hats BTW
reviews.review_description:
This is my second time taking a gondola ride in Venice. This time it is along the Grand Canal in an immersive VR app. I must say: this is so photorealistic with 360 view that I had an impression, I was part of this ride. I was Sam ;))

The gondolier in this ride was more talkative than the one we had back in 2023 together with my girlfriend. 

I noticed striking contrast of hats:
Dart's white hat with black&white mask (carnival time)  and Gondolier's distinctive, traditional Venetian hat with red ribbon.
